creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
Created attachment 221999
Patch for 12-STABLE powerd(8) to weight (scale) nice and user idle CPU load

tested on 12-STABLE amd64.
The patch also went through w/o errors on a few weeks old 13-CURRENT (it has 7 lines of context), but I did neither try to compile that, nor run it on 13-CURRENT.
